title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF ANAO-AON, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, TO SAN FRANCISCO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1768 / 67 OG No. 38, 7450 (September 23, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6218, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF ANAO-AON, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, TO SAN FRANCISCO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Anao-aon in the Province of Surigao del Norte, is hereby changed to San Francisco,

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
